info.title: Open5e — demo subset + auth
info.description:
The Open5e API. See [https://github.com/open5e/open5e-api] for more information.

DEMO SUBSET: trimmed to spells, creatures, and classes to keep the docs-tooling comparison clean and within free-tier limits. The full spec is shared/openapi.json.

AUTH VARIANT: adds one FAKE authenticated POST (/v2/encounters/) — NOT part of the real Open5e API — purely to exercise request-body, security-scheme, and mutation rendering.

get.description:
list: API endpoint for returning a list of spells.
retrieve: API endpoint for returning a particular spell.

parameters.name: duration

enum: 24 hours or until the target attempts a third death saving throw

parameters.description:
Description of the duration of the effect such as "instantaneous" or "1 minute"

* `instantaneous` - instantaneous
* `instantaneous or special` - instantaneous or special
* `1 turn` - 1 turn
* `1 round` - 1 round
* `concentration + 1 round` - concentration + 1 round
* `2 rounds` - 2 rounds
* `3 rounds` - 3 rounds
* `4 rounds` - 4 rounds
* `1d4+2 rounds` - 1d4+2 rounds
* `5 rounds` - 5 rounds
* `6 rounds` - 6 rounds
* `10 rounds` - 10 rounds
* `up to 1 minute` - up to 1 minute
* `1 minute` - 1 minute
* `1 minute, or until expended` - 1 minute, or until expended
* `1 minute, until expended` - 1 minute, until expended
* `1 minute` - 1 minute
* `5 minutes` - 5 minutes
* `10 minutes` - 10 minutes
* `1 minute or 1 hour` - 1 minute or 1 hour
* `up to 1 hour` - up to 1 hour
* `1 hour` - 1 hour
* `1 hour or until triggered` - 1 hour or until triggered
* `2 hours` - 2 hours
* `3 hours` - 3 hours
* `1d10 hours` - 1d10 hours
* `6 hours` - 6 hours
* `2-12 hours` - 2-12 hours
* `up to 8 hours` - up to 8 hours
* `8 hours` - 8 hours
* `1 hour/caster level` - 1 hour/caster level
* `10 hours` - 10 hours
* `12 hours` - 12 hours
* `24 hours or until the target attempts a third death saving throw` - 24 hours or until the target attempts a third death saving throw
* `24 hours` - 24 hours
* `1 day` - 1 day
* `3 days` - 3 days
* `5 days` - 5 days
* `7 days` - 7 days
* `10 days` - 10 days
* `13 days` - 13 days
* `30 days` - 30 days
* `1 year` - 1 year
* `special` - special
* `until dispelled or destroyed` - until dispelled or destroyed
* `until destroyed` - until destroyed
* `until dispelled` - until dispelled
* `until cured or dispelled` - until cured or dispelled
* `until dispelled or triggered` - until dispelled or triggered
* `permanent until discharged` - permanent until discharged
* `permanent; one generation` - permanent; one generation
* `permanent` - permanent

parameters.name: casting_time__in
parameters.description: Multiple values may be separated by commas.

parameters.name: casting_time
parameters.description:
Casting time key, such as 'action'

* `reaction` - Reaction
* `bonus-action` - 1 Bonus Action
* `action` - 1 Action
* `turn` - 1 Turn
* `round` - 1 Round
* `1minute` - 1 Minute
* `5minutes` - 5 Minutes
* `10minutes` - 10 Minutes
* `1hour` - 1 Hour
* `4hours` - 4 Hours
* `7hours` - 7 Hours
* `8hours` - 8 Hours
* `9hours` - 9 Hours
* `12hours` - 12 Hours
* `24hours` - 24 Hours
* `1week` - 1 Week

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

post.description: Create a saved encounter (a named set of creatures). DEMO-ONLY endpoint added to exercise request-body + auth rendering; not in the real API.

Ability.description:
Much of the logic included in the GameContentSerializer is intended to
support manipulating data returned by the serializer via query parameters.

desc.description: Description of the game content item. Markdown.

AbilitySummary.description:
A slimmer AbilitySerializer, designed to serialize Ability FKs on other
serializers. ie. The `saving_throws` field on CharacterClassSerializer. Not
intended to be used directly with in a ModelViewset.

grants_stealth_disadvantage.description: If the armor results in disadvantage on stealth checks.

strength_score_required.description: Strength score required to wear the armor without penalty.

ac_base.description: Integer representing the armor class without modifiers.

ac_add_dexmod.description: If the final armor class includes dexterity modifier.

ac_cap_dexmod.description: Integer representing the dexterity modifier cap.

ArmorSummary.description:
A slightly slimmer ArmorSerializer, designed to serialize Armor FKs on
other serializers. ie. The `armor` field on the ItemSerializer. Not
intended to be used directly in a ModelViewset.

ac_base.description: Integer representing the armor class without modifiers.

ac_add_dexmod.description: If the final armor class includes dexterity modifier.

ac_cap_dexmod.description: Integer representing the dexterity modifier cap.

grants_stealth_disadvantage.description: If the armor results in disadvantage on stealth checks.

strength_score_required.description: Strength score required to wear the armor without penalty.

type.description:
Modification type.

* `tool_proficiency` - Tool Proficiency
* `language` - Language
* `equipment` - Equipment
* `feature` - Feature
* `feat` - Feat
* `suggested_characteristics` - Suggested Characteristics
* `adventures_and_advancement` - Adventures and Advancement
* `connection_and_memento` - Connection and Memento

level.description: Integer representing the default slot level required by the spell.

higher_level.description: Description of casting the spell at a different level.

target_type.description:
Spell target type key.

* `creature` - Creature
* `object` - Object
* `point` - Point
* `area` - Area

ritual.description: Whether or not the spell can be cast as a ritual.

casting_time.description:
Casting time key, such as 'action'

* `reaction` - Reaction
* `bonus-action` - 1 Bonus Action

somatic.description: Whether or not casting the spell requires a verbal component.

material.description: Whether or not casting the spell requires a verbal component.

material_specified.description: Description of the material specified for the spell.

material_cost.description: Number representing the cost of the materials of the spell.

material_consumed.description: Whether or the material component is consumed during the casting.

target_count.description: Integer representing the count of targets.

attack_roll.description: Whether or not the spell effect requires an attack roll.

damage_roll.description: The damage roll for the field in dice notation. Empty string if no roll.

damage_roll.description: The damage roll for the field in dice notation. Empty string if no roll.

target_count.description: Integer representing the count of targets.

duration.description: Description of the duration of the effect such as "instantaneous" or "Up to 1 minute"

range.description: Description of the range of the spell.

concentration.description: Whether the effect requires concentration to be maintained.

desc.description: Description of complex casting option effects that cannot be captured in other fields.

SpellSchool.description:
Much of the logic included in the GameContentSerializer is intended to
support manipulating data returned by the serializer via query parameters.

desc.description: Description of the game content item. Markdown.

SpellSchoolSummary.description:
A slimmer SpellSchoolSerializer, designed to serialize Spell School FKs on
other serializers. ie. The `school` field on the SpellSerializer. Not
intended to be used directly in a ModelViewset.

Weapon.description:
Much of the logic included in the GameContentSerializer is intended to
support manipulating data returned by the serializer via query parameters.

damage_dice.description: The damage dice when used making an attack.

is_simple.description: If the weapon category is simple.

type.description: Weapon property type: ie. Weapon Mastery, etc.

WeaponSummary.description:
A (slightly) more slender version of the WeaponSerializer. Designed for
serializing FKs to the Weapons table in other serializers – ie. the
`"weapon"` field on the ItemSerializer

damage_dice.description: The damage dice when used making an attack.

is_simple.description: If the weapon category is simple.

_CrossReferenceLink.description: One link in crossreferences.to; defines API shape and serialization.
